html:
Exclusive to:

“Used to measure the weight of Ocean Fish.”

-

The Pocket Scale is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is crafted with one Log, one Cut Stone, and one Gold Nugget. It requires a Science Machine to prototype.

The Pocket Scale is used to measure the Weight of Ocean Fishes. It can be used to anticipate the results of the Fish Scale-O-Matic or if Crabby Hermit will accept it. Killing a heavy large Ocean Fish will give one extra Fish Morsel along with one Raw Fish, and killing a small Ocean Fish will give one Raw Fish instead of one Fish Morsel.

Trivia

  • The Pocket Scale was introduced in the Hook, Line, and Inker update.

Gallery

  • Pocket Scale Used
DSTDSRoGSWHam

"pocket_scale"
“A scaled-down weighing device.”
–Wilson
“Hey, now I can weigh my fish... not that I care.”
–Willow
“Tiny scale fit in palm of Wolfgang's hand!”
–Wolfgang
“What is the weight of my actions?”
–Wendy
“HELLO MY POCKET-SIZED BRETHREN”
–WX-78
“I'm always prepared to weigh in.”
–Wickerbottom
“I'm gonna reel in a whopper, no doubt aboot it.”
–Woodie
“I keep it next to my pocket watch and my pocket comb.”
–Maxwell
“How did I fare with my catch?”
–Wigfrid
“Wonder how heavy our fish is!”
–Webber
“A simple way to weigh!”
–Warly
“Weigh thing”
–Wormwood
“What a handy doo-hickey!”
–Winona
“Allow me to quickly weigh in, hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Is funny measure thing.”
–Wurt
“Do you think there's a badge for catching the biggest fish?”
–Walter
“In my opinion, everything should have a pocket-sized version.”
–Wanda
“Used to measure the weight of Ocean Fish.”
-
The Pocket Scale is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is crafted with one Log, one Cut Stone, and one Gold Nugget. It requires a Science Machine to prototype.
The Pocket Scale is used to measure the Weight of Ocean Fishes. It can be used to anticipate the results of the Fish Scale-O-Matic or if Crabby Hermit will accept it. Killing a heavy large Ocean Fish will give one extra Fish Morsel along with one Raw Fish, and killing a small Ocean Fish will give one Raw Fish instead of one Fish Morsel.

{{Scrapbook Info|Used to measure the weight of Ocean Fish.}}
The '''Pocket Scale''' is a craftable [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. It is crafted with one [[Log]], one [[Cut Stone]], and one [[Gold Nugget]]. It requires a [[Science Machine]] to prototype.

The Pocket Scale is used to measure the [[Weight]]  of [[Ocean Fishes]]. It can be used to anticipate the results of the [[Fish Scale-O-Matic]] or if [[Crabby Hermit]] will accept it. Killing a heavy large Ocean Fish will give one extra [[Fish Morsel]] along with one [[Raw Fish]], and killing a small Ocean Fish will give one Raw Fish instead of one Fish Morsel.

=={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* The Pocket Scale was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Hook, Line, and Inker|Hook, Line, and Inker]]'' update.
